question: [File: 'File Name: rest/transactions.js -> Scope: High: Authorizing transactions without approval from signers/owners'] [Function: createCryptoTransferList()] Can an unprivileged external user observe a transfer where is_approval is NULL in the database being silently coerced to false by the isNil(is_approval) ? false : is_approval logic, causing a transfer that was never owner-approved to appear as a non-approval transfer in the API response, misleading downstream clients into treating an unauthorized debit as a legitimate owner-initiated one?
